top_signals.title: Bloomberg Wealth: Rob Wallace
top_signals.summary: Rob Wallace oversees Stanford University's roughly $50 billion endowment as CEO of Stanford Management Company. Before entering the world of investing, he spent 16 years as a professional ballet dancer. On this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth with David Rubenstein, Wallace discusses his unconventional path to finance, the portfolio overhaul he led at Stanford, how he thinks about AI and private markets, and the challenges of investing for future generations. This interview was recorded April 9 in Palo Alto, CA. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
